candidates.why: Clearly labeled as operating revenue; matches definition of total revenue/sales and equals total operating income.

variables.notes: No suitable cost of goods sold or cost of sales line is available among candidates.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A component representing personnel/overhead costs, not COGS; clearly an operating expense.
Generic overhead/operating expenses bucket; fits SG&A definition and is distinct from COGS and D&A.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not an expense; should not be used for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization, which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not an expense line; not SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected only operating overhead components and excluded amortization and balance sheet items per SG&A rules.

candidates.why: Represents capitalized R&D asset on the balance sheet, not the period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset related to capitalized R&D; not an expense line item.

variables.notes: Only capitalized R&D balance sheet items are available; no clear R&D expense line is provided among candidates, so XRD is left empty pending manual review.

candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; narrower than total interest expense.
Explicit total interest expense line on the income statement; best match for XINT per hierarchy.
Derivative-related gains/losses, not pure interest expense.
Represents allocation of profit, unrelated to interest costs.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; subset of total interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.
Equity for minority holders, not interest expense.
Equity for minority holders, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Chosen the main income statement Interest Expense line as the best representation of interest cost.

candidates.why: Component of equity rather than total equity; better to use a total equity measure for BE.
Component of equity; not the aggregate book equity figure.
Represents total equity but appears to exclude minor balancing adjustments and possibly NCI; slightly differs from TOTAL EQUITY.
Labeled as overall equity total and aligns with total equity including small balancing adjustments; best single proxy for book equity.
Technical balancing row; should be excluded.
Balancing adjustment; not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Total assets/liabilities+equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Used the primary TOTAL EQUITY line as the book equity measure, avoiding component and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Represents income attributable to non-controlling interests, but MIB targets the balance sheet minority interest position.
Same as non-controlling interests on the income statement; income allocation, not stock.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; suitable for MIB.
Balance sheet minority interest line; also directly represents non-controlling equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet Minority Interest line as the book value of non-controlling interests for MIB.
